prompt: High-end commercial travel photography shot with an extreme 8mm fisheye lens from a worm’s-eye view, camera placed flat on the cobblestone ground in the center of a historic European city plaza. A trendy young female traveler with long brown hair steps directly over the camera, full body visible, face fully visible and looking straight into the lens with an energetic, inviting smile. Her raised sneaker sole dominates the foreground, showing detailed dirt and tread texture; her other foot is planted near the bottom edge. She wears a light blue Nike windbreaker with white panels, dark jogger pants, pale blue sneakers, earrings, and rings, with one hand reaching down toward the lens for dramatic depth. Surround the subject with a circular ring of tall historic stone buildings, arcades, domes, towers, and a clock tower, all heavily curved by the fisheye perspective into a globe-like frame. The sky fills the center behind her: vivid saturated blue with bright white scattered clouds. Include small pedestrians around the distant plaza edges for scale. Ultra-wide distorted perspective, crisp architectural detail, realistic commercial travel aesthetic, vibrant colors, dynamic adventurous mood, sharp focus, natural daylight, no text, no watermark.
